prompt: Aerial view of a vast party or social gathering in a grand hall. In the foreground, one solitary figure stands with just two people beside them, looking outward into the crowd. Each of those two companions is visibly surrounded by five or six animated people. Each of those groups is itself part of a larger cluster of ten or more people. The crowd densifies toward the background from sparse and isolated in the foreground to an overwhelming mass of interconnected people in the distance. The lone foreground figure is gazing into this expanding social universe. Cinematic overhead photography, warm golden light, shallow depth of field, photorealistic, no text, no labels, no diagrams
visual_logic: A lone figure with two companions gazes into a crowd where each person is surrounded by more people than them, densifying to an overwhelming mass — every viewer is always the least connected person visible.
